title: Remove gitvalidation from travis
body:
gitvalidation in travis has been problematic.  It is already
being done in Fedora and Centos so we have a reliable test
occuring there.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, it's failed twice in two days. Not worth the hassle.

:pushpin: Commit 43ad6fa has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 43ad6fa95e1e0a5e788b1fef569732a08fcf51b9 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
